isi.lyrics:
Lyric SOOJIN - Little Bit More

Romanization

natseolgetji everyday
yeoyuropge chumeul chuneun body
Looking like a hottie

I look the other way
ne nun sogeul hyanghae Runnin’
ppajyeodeureo Drownin’

Baby you
Don’t got a clue
meomutdaeneun nuni
jiruhae So boring

It’s on you
Make a move
dareun gireun eopseo
nal beoseonal su eopseo

You should touch me a little bit
You should kiss me a little bit more
hwaksineul deo gajyeodo dwae
nal ttokbaro bwa little bit more
You should tell me you love me
Say I’m pretty ya ready know
You should touch me a little bit
Just a little bit more
more

seuchyeoganeun traffic light
yeminhage ije pay attention
You’re so defensive

ne anui neol deo deureonae
keojyeoganeun neomanui fiction

Baby you

eoseolpeun ne nuni

hwaksineul deo gajyeodo dwae

You should touch me a little bit

more

dareun gireun eopseo

more

Lyric Zion.T - 물고기 (Fish)

Romanization

urin eohang soge gathin mulgogi du maricheoreom
seoro yeopeolgulman bogo gyeotnunjillo mal georeosseo
konnal jom bwa (umm)
You’re so fine
Let me take you ride tonight
Every day, every night uh uh

ppaljunochopanamsaek
banjjak bitman jjotneun ge
jeombu da ojingeogatae
naksibaneul pihae
mikkeureojideusi
na dasi doragallago
Feel like seumulset
wae jakku kkameongneunde
naega mworaenni
chaegim jindaetji
Got your back
Baby I got your back
Now sit,
ni gijuni mwonde
ni chinggudeureun
gyesok jjongaljjongaldae jeo byeong***

gwansim eopdaetji ne mikki
Kick the bo bo bottom reppin’ it
soyongdori gata yeppeuji
Let’s go down down down
To the deep

urin eohang soge gathin mulgogi du maricheoreom
yeopeolgulman bogo gyeotnunjillo mal georeosseo
konnal jom bwa (umm)
You’re so fine
Let me take you ride tonight
Every day, every night uh uh

maennal maennal maennal

Speaker bollyum up
kkameokji mallanikka?
satangballim mal
nan sireo sireo ssibeo
kkeutkkaji heulleogaja
I don’t give up give up give up

kkaman,
bitdo hana
eopdeon nae maeumsok
jam uh gyeo uh gadeon
nawa heeomchideon
geunyeol bwasseo

urin eohang soge gathyeoisseonne
To all my friends nan da jul sudo inne
mideojwo please uh
urin daehwahaji noraecheoreom
gipeun jeoeum suhwacheoreom
gyesok ppeokkeum ppeokkeumgeoryeo uh


Hangeul

우린 어항 속에 갇힌 물고기 두 마리처럼
서로 옆얼굴만 보고 곁눈질로 말 걸었어
콧날 좀 봐 (umm)
You’re so fine
Let me take you ride tonight
Every day, every night uh uh

빨주노초파남색
반짝 빛만 쫓는 게
전부 다 오징어같애
낚시바늘 피해
미끄러지듯이
나 다시 돌아갈라고
Feel like 스물셋
왜 자꾸 까먹는데
내가 뭐랬니
책임 진댔지
Got your back
Baby I got your back
Now sit,
니 기준이 뭔데
니 친구들은
계속 쫑알쫑알대 저 병***

관심 없댔지 네 미끼
Kick the bo bo bottom reppin’ it
소용돌이 같아 예쁘지
Let’s go down down down
To the deep
